# Usage Example:

**Query with Service and Methods:**
> Use service-method-generator skill to add LoadAsync, CreateAsync, UpdateAsync, and DeleteAsync methods to the RequestService class based on the IRequestRepository interface.
**带服务和方法的提问：**
> 使用 service-method-generator skill，根据 IRequestRepository 接口，为 RequestService 类添加 LoadAsync、CreateAsync、UpdateAsync 和 DeleteAsync 方法。
